commit d441f5759111d99616a75c2dbfdad545bf267d78
Author: Luna777247 <nguyenanhilu9785@gmail.com>
Date:   Fri Apr 17 14:35:39 2026 +0700

    refactor(pipeline): unify orchestration to single osm-google enriched flow
    
    - Set `master_pipeline_hanoi_tourism` to trigger the single unified pipeline: Bronze (OSM+Google) -> Silver -> Gold
    - Remove all legacy, standalone, and overlapping ingestion DAGs & spark jobs (hanoi_unified, google-only, osm-only) to enforce a single source of truth.
    - Fix Airflow 3 runtime `[Errno 111] Connection refused` by using native `AIRFLOW__CORE__EXECUTION_API_SERVER_URL` pointing worker execution strictly to the fast-api server.
    - Enhance CI/CD idempotency validation script ([validate_etl_idempotency.sh](cci:7://file:///d:/hn-smart-tourism-lakehouse/scripts/validate_etl_idempotency.sh:0:0-0:0)) via dynamic DAG polling, Python boto3 MinIO payload regex, and native Spark-submit Silver snapshot queries.
    - Clean up docs, reports, and README to reflect the finalized robust Lakehouse architecture.
